suite.name: Api Data Driven Suite

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=https://postman-echo.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Verificar Status Code Del Endpoint
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/status/200 path_url=/status/200 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
expected_status=any evita que RequestsLibrary lance una excepción automática ante un 4xx/5xx — así podemos validar casos negativos sin que el GET "falle" antes de llegar al assert.

kw.name: Verificar Status Code Del Endpoint
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/get path_url=/get headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Cookie': 'sails.sid=s%3AT9UBwJJ9CXZ5w3FHgD3NLM7o0avyKDEW.KQDkeooaqjjTDdZrcMp7AotsFkxe35aMELXkBe5iDIA; __cf_bm=f5u3MhFXdvaX3CF3x0Ou58OSOmvCP5slWxa1sLUS9FE-1781606013.8348587-1.0.1.1-74bWf6UqpIOWL_jZKcrEdRVDoOzvrDsLKp00xCcr_XWwE55BRvNuAInwLVC96lOODic2Hp6xdYfxke_6ZDrLr7iQyXhbj5tALAxO7W7Sa3eLnJWtI7fJUuVPBovN0g2j; _cfuvid=wbg2aeg.CAj.81WVuYJnso12fynXpjSwE1RxJSfGMb4-1781606013.8348587-1.0.1.1-NKeqZOPYL1KHu3fYpMIjRbOH5ZwpL6GEqURE8fXEKII'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
expected_status=any evita que RequestsLibrary lance una excepción automática ante un 4xx/5xx — así podemos validar casos negativos sin que el GET "falle" antes de llegar al assert.

kw.name: Verificar Status Code Del Endpoint
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/status/404 path_url=/status/404 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Cookie': 'sails.sid=s%3Arc8KxD2K18gtyZj3WQyNnzdf7ODo4B5w.4wvpMbxWyJCYTsx2JvJYT0TkyoI8kUOg6FQ%2Bw%2Bd%2FBTA; __cf_bm=f5u3MhFXdvaX3CF3x0Ou58OSOmvCP5slWxa1sLUS9FE-1781606013.8348587-1.0.1.1-74bWf6UqpIOWL_jZKcrEdRVDoOzvrDsLKp00xCcr_XWwE55BRvNuAInwLVC96lOODic2Hp6xdYfxke_6ZDrLr7iQyXhbj5tALAxO7W7Sa3eLnJWtI7fJUuVPBovN0g2j; _cfuvid=wbg2aeg.CAj.81WVuYJnso12fynXpjSwE1RxJSfGMb4-1781606013.8348587-1.0.1.1-NKeqZOPYL1KHu3fYpMIjRbOH5ZwpL6GEqURE8fXEKII'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
expected_status=any evita que RequestsLibrary lance una excepción automática ante un 4xx/5xx — así podemos validar casos negativos sin que el GET "falle" antes de llegar al assert.

kw.name: Verificar Status Code Del Endpoint
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/status/500 path_url=/status/500 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Cookie': 'sails.sid=s%3A44E5ODGLPKxxsIOLNI2hGwGvw7A0jUzz.3u6D9KkXOrABICdvCMPZQr18bDuYb9ccIPzBHiqM9aU; __cf_bm=f5u3MhFXdvaX3CF3x0Ou58OSOmvCP5slWxa1sLUS9FE-1781606013.8348587-1.0.1.1-74bWf6UqpIOWL_jZKcrEdRVDoOzvrDsLKp00xCcr_XWwE55BRvNuAInwLVC96lOODic2Hp6xdYfxke_6ZDrLr7iQyXhbj5tALAxO7W7Sa3eLnJWtI7fJUuVPBovN0g2j; _cfuvid=wbg2aeg.CAj.81WVuYJnso12fynXpjSwE1RxJSfGMb4-1781606013.8348587-1.0.1.1-NKeqZOPYL1KHu3fYpMIjRbOH5ZwpL6GEqURE8fXEKII'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
expected_status=any evita que RequestsLibrary lance una excepción automática ante un 4xx/5xx — así podemos validar casos negativos sin que el GET "falle" antes de llegar al assert.

suite.doc: Práctica 14 — Sesión 7. Suite API data-driven (DataDriver) que cubre escenarios positivos y negativos, segmentados por tags smoke/ regresion.
